name: ceap
description: Enterprise agentic engineering workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Enterprise agentic engineering workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: CEAP adds structured Codex workflows for ticket-to-code orchestration, repository context analysis, quality engineering, security governance, multi-agent planning, enterprise memory, release readiness, and regulated engineering environments.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this ticket and create an implementation plan.
Review this change for CEAP governance risks.
Build a multi-agent workflow for this incident.
